'''mayadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jicama|jicama]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jicama|jicama]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mayadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæyædhæth|mæyædhæth]] || [[word:mæyædhæj|mæyædhæj]] || [[word:mæyædhæsh|mæyædhæsh]] || [[word:mæyædhæ|mæyædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayayadhath|mayayadhath]] || [[word:mayayadhaj|mayayadhaj]] || [[word:mayayadhash|mayayadhash]] || [[word:mayayadha|mayayadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayadhath|mayadhath]] || [[word:mayadhaj|mayadhaj]] || [[word:mayadhash|mayadhash]] || [[word:mayadha|mayadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayafdhath|mayafdhath]] || [[word:mayafdhaj|mayafdhaj]] || [[word:mayafdhash|mayafdhash]] || [[word:mayafdhaf|mayafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mayadhatha|mayadhatha]] || [[word:mayadhaja|mayadhaja]] || [[word:mayadhasha|mayadhasha]] || [[word:mayadhaka|mayadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mayadhath|mayadhath]] || [[word:mayadhaj|mayadhaj]] || [[word:mayadhash|mayadhash]] || [[word:mayadha|mayadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mayadhathal|mayadhathal]] || [[word:mayadhajal|mayadhajal]] || [[word:mayadhashal|mayadhashal]] || [[word:mayadhakal|mayadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mayadhathatha|mayadhathatha]] || [[word:mayadhajaja|mayadhajaja]] || [[word:mayadhashasha|mayadhashasha]] || [[word:mayadhaka|mayadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mayadhathan|mayadhathan]] || [[word:mayadhajan|mayadhajan]] || [[word:mayadhashan|mayadhashan]] || [[word:mayadhakan|mayadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mayadhathaoro|mayadhathaoro]] || [[word:mayadhajaoro|mayadhajaoro]] || [[word:mayadhashaoro|mayadhashaoro]] || [[word:mayadhakaoro|mayadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
